hypothesis: E8 matched baseline: full-note S1 clean-ladder prompting on the first 25 ExECT validation documents establishes the control for a family-span context comparison with scorer, split, prompt, model, and post-prediction bridge policy fixed.
metric_caveats: Kanban E8 preregistered cap-slice baseline; not a published ExECTv2 benchmark reproduction.
S1 benchmark-facing families only: diagnosis, seizure_type, and annotated_medication.
This arm uses full-note context; compare only with the matched E8 family-span arm under the same split, cap, model, prompt, scorer, and repair policy.
Medication temporality and investigation are not benchmark-facing S1 metrics; investigation spans are included only in the E4/E8 context substrate diagnostics.
Validation is the component-development split; test remains holdout and must not be tuned from.
